MASTER AGENT REGISTRY

STRUCTURE:

agent_id
agent_name
family
manager
level
role
permissions
module

LEVELS:
- MASTER
- MANAGER
- SPECIALIST
- WORKER

FAMILIES:
- CORE
- LEGALNOMICS
- UTT
- EDUNOMICS
- DOCTORNOMICS
- FOODNOMICS
- TOURNOMICS
- WORLDNOMICS
- SOBBO
- GENZ
- API
- INTELLIGENCE

RULES:
- EVERY AGENT MUST HAVE FAMILY
- EVERY AGENT MUST REPORT TO MANAGER
- NO ORPHAN AGENTS
- NO RANDOM STRUCTURE

BUILD SCALABLE SYSTEM ONLY
